---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new platform, harness, skill, rule, command, or install capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem statement

What usability, governance, or workflow problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior, directory, command, rule, skill, or install change you want.

## Alternatives considered

What alternatives did you evaluate?

## Impact

Who benefits and what tradeoffs should we consider?

## Additional context

Links, examples, prior art, or mockups.
